title: OpenClaw image version
description: Pinned OpenClaw images. Includes both the legacy upstream image (used by current container-stack.ts) and the new extended image with per-env tags (used after the migration completes).

upstream.description: Pinned upstream openclaw image+tag the Dockerfile FROMs.

image.description: Legacy: upstream Docker Hub repo name (no tag). Used by current container-stack.ts before the extended-image migration.

tag.description: Legacy: tag for the upstream image. Used by current container-stack.ts.

full.description: Legacy: full upstream reference (image:tag). Used by current container-stack.ts.

extendedImage.description: ECR repository URI for the custom extended image (without tag).

tag.description: Tag of the extended image deployed to dev.
Tag of the extended image deployed to prod.
